violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Walkin freezer door does not shut due to ice buildup needs repair. Frost buildup beneath cooling unit inside walkin freezer indicates the cooling unit needs repair.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling in prep area needs cleaning. Floor inside walkin cooler and walkin freezer need cleaning. There also exists an ice/frost buildup beneath cooling unit inside walkin freezer to be cleaned up.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Upper unnderside of hot holding unit needs cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling light covers and some ceiling areas in prep and front service areas need cleaning. Floor in back- kitchen storage area and inside ( both ) walkin cooler and freezer need cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Upper underside of fry warming unit needs cleaning. Bottom-inside reachin 'Silver King' freezer needs cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Walkin freezer door noted iced-over new seal may be needed.
